message:
style(fcp-cbor): apply rustfmt + promote allocation-free helpers to const fn

Pure cosmetic / `const fn` cleanup of `crates/fcp-cbor/src/lib.rs`. No
behavioral change.

* Reformat `canonicalize_map_scratch_capacity_with_limit`,
  `append_canonical_map_key_bytes`, and `payload_too_large_io_error` per
  current `rustfmt` defaults so subsequent diffs aren't noisy.
* Promote `CountingWriter::new`, `CountingWriter::len`, and
  `LimitedVecWriter::new` to `const fn`. None of them allocate or rely
  on runtime-only operations, so this lets callers use them in const
  contexts (e.g. compile-time bound calculations) and keeps the
  scratch-buffer bookkeeping free of accidental hidden cost.
* Compress the three-entry vector literal in
  `canonicalize_map_rejects_cumulative_key_bytes_over_limit` from the
  multi-line form rustfmt produced under the old config back to a
  single-line tuple per row, matching the rest of this file's style.
